case_title: AUTOVEST LLC VS. IRWIN BOUTTIE ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUTTIE, IRWIN $8,221.26 PRINCIPAL, $291.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,513.16, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-29-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
